parts.text: I gave consent for Voice ID, but the system shows opt-out.

We’re seeing issues with call forwarding and conference calls on Advantage Voice.
Our voicemail-to-email feature isn’t working. We need this fixed quickly.

I’m calling for my bussiness. Our Advantage Voice phones aren’t working—we can’t make or receive calls, and this is impacting our operations.
